positive: A stylized, geometric composition featuring a collection of diverse nature elements: blooming florals, whispering reeds, stylized hummingbirds, and abstract botanical forms. The elements should be arranged in a balanced, symmetrical semi-circle, creating a lush, intricate wreath effect. Use a sophisticated color palette of deep emerald greens, muted gold, rich indigo, and creamy ivory. The style should be a blend of Art Deco illustration and modern folk art, utilizing clean silhouettes and strong, continuous line work. The background must be stark white (negative space), ensuring the focus remains entirely on the central print. Excellent contrast, suitable for screen printing on fabric, vector art quality, high detail, central composition, isolated object.
negative: blurry, poorly drawn, artifact, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, cropped, out of frame, messy, noise, extra limbs, low resolution
